prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.1 kg; Height 168.3 cm; BMI 32.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 9.1%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 241mg/dL; 6 months ago 262mg/dL; 3 months ago 255mg/dL; current 257mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 90.2kg; 9 months ago 93.9kg; 6 months ago 88.6kg; 3 months ago 90.8kg; current 92.1kg), Height (12 months ago 168.3cm; 9 months ago 168.3cm; 6 months ago 168.3cm; 3 months ago 168.3cm; current 168.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 145mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.4mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 4.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 385mg/g; 9 months ago 502mg/g; 6 months ago 384mg/g; 3 months ago 598mg/g; current 569mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 106mg/dL; 6 months ago 104mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
